title: Patient consulte son DMN et confirme accès document par mot de passe
source_extraction: verifie Cascade, tests/e2e/s06-acces-dmn.spec.js + code source dmn.routes.js/dmn.service.js

checks.query: SELECT access_type FROM dmn_access_log WHERE patient_phone = '+242069735418' AND access_type = 'consultation' AND accessed_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '15 minutes' ORDER BY accessed_at DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT access_type FROM dmn_access_log WHERE patient_phone = '+242069735418' AND access_type = 'download' AND accessed_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '15 minutes' ORDER BY accessed_at DESC LIMIT 1
checks.note: trace laissee par la confirmation du mot de passe (route /dmn/download/verify), verifiee via logAccess ligne 65 de dmn.routes.js
